Article.ArticleTitle: International Utah Cardiac Recovery Symposium (U-CARS) 2025: Clinical Science Proceedings.

Division of Cardiovascular Medicine & Nora Eccles Harrison Cardiovascular Research and Training Institute (CVRTI), University of Utah Health & School of Medicine, 30 North 1900 East, Room 4A150, Salt Lake City, UT, 84132, USA. stavros.drakos@hsc.utah.edu.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Competing interests: Funding: AHA Heart Failure Strategically Focused Research Network, 16SFRN29020000 (Drs. Drakos, Stehlik and Selzman), 2. NHLBI R01 HL135121-01 (Dr. Drakos), 3. NHLBI R01 HL132067-01A1 (Dr. Drakos), 4. Nora Eccles Treadwell Foundation (Dr. Drakos), 5. Merit Review Award I01 CX002291 U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs (Dr. Drakos).Disclosures: Dr. Drakos serves as a consultant for Abbott and Berlin Heals and has received research support from Novartis. Disclosures: Dr. Drakos serves as a consultant for Abbott and Berlin Heals and has received research support from Novartis. Human Ethics declaration: not applicable.
